RECORD TABLE 
Issue Date § Description of Change Author Validated By 
1.0 
 
23/12/2016 
 
 
 
All 
 
 
 
[EIS April 2017: IBI-V3 version]  
Generation of the document for 
the V3 Copernicus Marine Service 
operational release. 
M. G. Sotillo 
A. Amo 
L. Aouf  
C. Toledano. 
 
E. Álvarez 
Fanjul 
 
 
2.0 
 
23/12/2017 
 
 
 
All 
 
 
 
[EIS Mar 2018: IBI-V4 version]  
Update of the document with the 
changes required for the WAV-V4 
release.  
M. G.  Sotillo 
A. Amo 
L. Aouf 
C. Toledano 
 
E. Álvarez 
Fanjul 
 
 
3.0 17/04/2019  [EIS Jul 2019: IBI-V5 version]  
Changes related to the increase of 
the spatial resolution. 
New dataset for static files. 
 
A. Amo 
 
M.G. Sotillo 
3.1 04/09/2019  [EIS Dec 2019: IBI-V5 version]  
Update of atmospheric forcing. 
Increase of temporal resolution 
(from 3-hour to hourly winds). 
 
A. Amo 
C. Toledano 
M.G. Sotillo 
4.0 03/04/2020 All [EIS Jul 2020: IBI-V6 version]  
Update of the MFWAM model 
code.  
Implementation of current forcing 
and SWH altimeter data 
assimilation. 
 
A. Amo 
L. Aouf 
C. Toledano 
 M.G. Sotillo 
4.1 10/09/2020 All [EIS Dec 2020: IBI-V6 version]  
Forecast extension to 10-days for 
the second cycle of the day (12H). 
 
A. Amo 
L. Aouf 
C. Toledano 
M.G. Sotillo 
4.2 08/08/2022 All [EIS Nov 2022: IBI-V6 version]  
WAV data Assimilation system 
upgrade to include directional 
wave spectra form CFOSAT and 
Sentinel-1A.  
Adaptation of the document to the 
new template. 
A. Amo 
C. Toledano 
L. Aouf 
R. Aznar 
 
M.G. Sotillo

IBI_ANALYSISFORECAST_WAV_005_005 
Issue : 5.0 
2024/11 
 
 
© EU Copernicus Marine Service – Public   
Ref : CMEMS-IBI-PUM-005-005 
3 
4.3 16/06/2023 All [EIS Nov 2023: IBI-V7 version]  
Model system update: same new 
code and model set-up used for the  
IBI_MULTIYEAR_WAV_005_006 
product, but keeping the same 
resolution (1/20º). 
New highest wave variables. 
Update of static files. 
 
A. Amo 
C. Toledano 
L. Aouf 
 
S. Cailleau 
M. G. Sotillo 
  5.0 31/05/2024 All [EIS Nov 2024: IBI-V8 version]  
Model system update:  Resolution 
increased from 1/20º to 1/36º. 
 
Assimilation system  upgrade: 
inclusion of  SWOT-NADIR and 
HY2B altimetric data. 
L. Castrillo 
B. Gómez 
L. Aouf 
S. Cailleau 
M. G. Sotillo

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for IBI_ANALYSISFORECAST_WAV_005_005, detailing the product's history of changes and updates from version V3 to V8 as of November 2024.

product_line.name: Analysis and Forecast Wave Product for IBI Region
